name: Pasta Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare angel hair pasta as directed on package.
2. Rinse and drain the pasta. Set aside.
3. In a 6-inch nonstick skillet, combine chopped green peppers and onion with water. Cook over medium-high heat for 3 to 5 minutes, or until vegetables are tender, stirring frequently. Set aside.
4. In a 10-inch nonstick skillet, spread the cooked pasta and cook until lightly browned on the underside, about 4 to 6 minutes.
5. Turn the pasta crust onto a plate. Place the crust back into the skillet with the browned side up and reduce heat to medium.
6. Spoon the spaghetti sauce evenly over the crust.
7. Top the pizza evenly with prepared vegetables and sprinkle with cheese and Italian seasoning.
8. Cover and cook until the cheese is melted, about 4 to 5 minutes.
9. Cut the pizza into wedges.
